info.title: Instrumetriq: Crypto Sentiment & Market Data
info.subtitle: Daily AI-scored X sentiment with spot, futures, and microstructure from Binance
info.description:
## Instrumetriq - Crypto Market Activity & Sentiment Context Dataset

Time-aligned market data with social context and participation dynamics.
Each entry represents a ~2-hour monitoring session for a single crypto asset,
combining AI-scored sentiment from X (Twitter) with market microstructure
from Binance.

This dataset contains **14 weekly samples** covering
**2025-12-21** through **2026-03-22**. Updated weekly (Mondays).

---

### What is measured

**Sentiment (X / Twitter)**
- Post counts by sentiment class (positive, neutral, negative)
- Mean sentiment score per cycle
- Silence detection (no recent posts observed)
- Scored by a dual-model pipeline: BERTweet primary model with DistilBERT
  referee for confidence calibration, preceded by a crypto relevance filter

**Spot market (Binance)**
- Mid price, bid, ask, last traded price
- Bid-ask spread (basis points)
- 24-hour price range and change
- Order book depth at 5/10/25 bps bands
- Taker buy ratio, order book imbalance, microstructure premium
- 700+ price samples at 10-second resolution (Tier 3 only)

**Futures (Binance USDT-M perpetuals, Tier 3 only)**
- Funding rate, open interest, basis
- Long/short ratio (top trader accounts)

---

### Dataset tiers

Each weekly sample contains files from three tiers:

| Tier | Columns | Format | Description |
|------|---------|--------|-------------|
| **Tier 1** | 19 flat | CSV + Parquet | Aggregated sentiment, spot price, liquidity score |
| **Tier 2** | 8 nested groups | Parquet | Full sentiment detail, author stats, engagement metrics |
| **Tier 3** | 12 nested groups | Parquet | Futures data, 700+ spot price samples, multi-window sentiment |

Tier 1 CSV is directly viewable in Kaggle's data explorer. Tier 2 and Tier 3
use nested Parquet structures - load with `pandas.read_parquet()` or DuckDB.

---

### Tier 1 schema (19 columns)

| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `symbol` | string | Trading pair (e.g. BTCUSDC) |
| `snapshot_ts` | datetime | Observation timestamp (UTC) |
| `meta_added_ts` | datetime | Session start time |
| `meta_expires_ts` | datetime | Session expiration time |
| `meta_duration_sec` | float | Session duration (~7200 seconds) |
| `meta_archive_schema_version` | int | Schema version (current: 7) |
| `spot_mid` | float | Order book mid price (USD) |
| `spot_spread_bps` | float | Bid-ask spread in basis points |
| `spot_range_pct_24h` | float | 24h price range as % of mid |
| `spot_ticker24_chg` | float | 24h price change (%) |
| `derived_liq_global_pct` | float | Global liquidity percentile |
| `derived_spread_bps` | float | Derived spread (bps) |
| `score_final` | float | Composite admission score |
| `sentiment_posts_total` | int | Total X posts in cycle |
| `sentiment_posts_pos` | int | Positive posts count |
| `sentiment_posts_neu` | int | Neutral posts count |
| `sentiment_posts_neg` | int | Negative posts count |
| `sentiment_mean_score` | float | Mean sentiment score |
| `sentiment_is_silent` | bool | No recent posts observed |

---

### Tier 3 highlights (nested fields)

Tier 3 adds substantial depth beyond Tier 1:

- **`spot_raw`**: Full order book snapshot - bid/ask prices, depth at multiple
  bands (5/10/25 bps), taker buy ratio, order book imbalance, microstructure
  premium, spread efficiency
- **`futures_raw`**: Funding rate (current + predicted), open interest,
  annualized basis, top trader long/short ratios (accounts and positions)
- **`spot_prices`**: Array of 700+ price samples collected every ~10 seconds
  during the 2-hour session - use for backtesting, MAE/MFE analysis, or
  intraday price action studies
- **`twitter_sentiment_windows`**: Two time windows (last_cycle and
  last_2_cycles) with detailed breakdowns - individual post counts by
  decision source (bertweet/distilbert/referee), lexicon category counts
  (pump_hype, fud_fear, etc.), engagement metrics, author statistics

---

### Coverage and methodology

- ~2,500 entries per day across tracked Binance pairs
- Running continuously since December 2025
- Each asset monitored in ~2-hour observation cycles
- Sentiment source: X (Twitter) public posts only
- Market data source: Binance spot + USDT-M futures
- Sentiment pipeline updated February 2026 (V1 → V2); entries include a
  `methodology_regime` field for version identification

### Limitations

- Observational data only - no predictions, signals, or trading advice
- X (Twitter) sentiment only (no Reddit, Discord, Telegram)
- Binance market data only
- No raw social media content or personally identifiable information
- Aggregated and anonymized sentiment counts

### Links

- Documentation: [instrumetriq.com](https://instrumetriq.com)
- Methodology: [instrumetriq.com/research](https://instrumetriq.com/research)
- GitHub: [SiCkGFX/instrumetriq-public](https://github.com/SiCkGFX/instrumetriq-public)
- DOI: [10.5281/zenodo.18508636](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18508636)
- Full dataset access: [instrumetriq.com/access](https://instrumetriq.com/access)
